name: MemberWelcomeNotifier

neutralConcepts: notification channels are MACHINE constants (not FREEDOM config keys)
PENDING vs ACTIVE members receive different message wording
wording templates from FREEDOM config — not hardcoded strings

ironRules.rule: Notification channels (in-app, email) are MACHINE constants — not FREEDOM config keys. The channel set is a deployment decision.
PENDING members receive 'pending approval' message wording. ACTIVE members receive 'welcome' message. Different status → different message.
Message wording templates from FREEDOM config — no hardcoded strings in notification content.

keywords: member welcome notifier notification channels PENDING ACTIVE message wording FREEDOM config
